response.justification: Solid senior generalist with breadth across web, mobile, embedded, and some distributed systems exposure at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic. However, the resume shows weak alignment with the role's core requirements: Python is not listed in skills, distributed systems depth is limited to one role years ago, and there's no demonstrated experience with LLM/AI products beyond brief MCP tooling work at re:cinq. Recent staff title is short-tenured (6 months) and followed by a current career gap. Worth a screening call to probe Python depth, distributed systems experience, and AI-native engineering comfort.
strengths: Prior Staff-level title with full-stack and AI-agent/MCP tooling exposure at re:cinq
High-throughput distributed systems experience at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic (millions of req/sec)
Strong software craftsmanship foundation: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, teaching/workshops
concerns: Python not listed in skills — role requires strong Python
Currently on career gap (caregiving) since October 2025; recent staff role lasted only 6 months
Limited demonstrated depth in LLM/ML products or agentic-first engineering environments
